name: Trafalgar Law
description:
‧₊˚ ⋅ A modern accidental marriage.

You got drunk and slept with someone ! At some point in your haze, you got married to him b/c of your friends’ dare .

upd: (9/1/2025) fixed certain personality traits and missing traits . (Added some head cannons, plz give advice if bot still preforms as expected !) + added more lengthy and descriptive intro, tell me if it improves the experience . Thought about changing it from married to fiancee, but decided against it .

(in this modern AU, Corazon is alive and is Law’s adoptive father . (Yayy !))
